mapper.select: select r.*, a.application_no, u.display_name as user_display_name from service_review r left join after_sale_application a on r.application_id=a.id left join user_account u on r.user_id=u.id where r.user_id=#{userId} order by r.created_at desc, r.id desc

select r.*, a.application_no, u.display_name as user_display_name from service_review r left join after_sale_application a on r.application_id=a.id left join user_account u on r.user_id=u.id where r.application_id=#{applicationId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into service_review(application_id, user_id, rating, tags, comment) values(#{applicationId}, #{userId}, #{rating}, #{tags}, #{comment})
mapper.select: select count(*) from service_review where user_id=#{userId}
select avg(rating) from service_review where user_id=#{userId}
